confirmation_evidence: Green 'Success — Your application was successfully submitted. We'll contact you if there are next steps.' banner rendered on the Ashby application page after Submit. Verified both by body-text scrape and by full-page screenshot read-back.
screening_questions: NONE on the form (pre-scanned + visually confirmed: no sponsorship gate, no EEO, no custom questions).
captcha_note: Ashby form carries invisible reCAPTCHA v3 (.grecaptcha-badge + recaptcha.net/api2/anchor iframe) — score-based, NO interactive challenge. Verified empirically: after clicking Submit, NO interactive v2/hCaptcha/Turnstile challenge iframe appeared (INTERACTIVE_CHALLENGE: []), and submission completed with Success banner. The built-in submit_c1_ashby.py CAPTCHA detector flags ANY recaptcha presence as a hard stop (false positive on v3); overridden after confirming no interactive challenge exists. No CAPTCHA was solved or bypassed.
